headline: You're 598 days behind—stop snacking today, period.
summary: You're losing 0.23 kg/week but need 0.60 kg/week; today you eliminate emotional eating and move hard before Friday derails your week.
details: Eat only portioned Huel meals and whole foods—zero snacking, zero exceptions, because Friday triggers your weekend spiral. Do 50 minutes rowing or treadmill hard today; your sedentary work demands intentional movement. You're 32.9 kg over target with 378 days left; compounding daily discipline today adds 0.37 kg/week back into your pace. Thursday is your reset before the weekend trap.
